data.title: Update completion-verifier.md — sentinel read path for manual:awaiting_user stories
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes
Modify plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md Step 3 (Evaluate Each Criterion).

Add a new subsection "Step 3b: Manual Story Sentinel Check" (parallel to existing Step 3a: Epic-Level Story Verdict Trust):

  When a story has the tag manual:awaiting_user:
  1. Scan the story's ticket comments for a comment whose body starts with "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL: "
  2. Parse the JSON payload after the prefix
  3. If sentinel is ABSENT:
     - Do NOT fail. Log: "Manual story <id> has no sentinel yet — story may be mid-handshake. Skipping done-definition evaluation."
     - Mark all done definitions as PENDING (not PASS or FAIL)
     - overall_verdict for this story: PENDING (do not count as FAIL)
  4. If sentinel is PRESENT and JSON parses successfully:
     - handshake_outcome=done AND verification_command_exit_code=0: mark all done definitions PASS
     - handshake_outcome=done AND verification_command_exit_code=null AND user_input is non-null: mark all done definitions PASS (confirmation token confirmed)
     - handshake_outcome=skip: mark all done definitions as SKIPPED (not FAIL — skip is a legitimate outcome)
     - handshake_outcome=done AND verification_command_exit_code != 0: mark done definitions FAIL
  5. If sentinel is PRESENT but JSON is malformed: log warning and treat as ABSENT (PENDING)

  Do NOT re-execute the verification_command. Do NOT re-prompt the user. The sentinel is the authoritative record.

Also update Step 4 (Consumer Smoke Tests): skip consumer smoke tests for manual:awaiting_user stories — they are process steps, not code behaviors.

## TDD Exemption
Exemption criterion: task modifies only non-executable LLM instruction files (completion-verifier.md). Unit Exemption Criterion 3: "static assets / non-executable instruction files". Structural boundary tests verify that the sentinel contract prefix is referenced.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] completion-verifier.md references MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL prefix
  Verify: grep -q "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md references manual:awaiting_user tag
  Verify: grep -q "manual:awaiting_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md references the sentinel contract doc
  Verify: grep -q "manual-pause-sentinel" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] PENDING verdict handling documented (not FAIL on absent sentinel)
  Verify: grep -q "PENDING\|ABSENT\|mid-handshake" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 1
